segments.text: There was a man of the Pharisees, named Nicodemus, a ruler of the Jews
The same came to Jesus by night, and said unto him,
Rabbi, we know that thou art a teacher come from God: for no man can do these miracles that thou doest, except God be with him.
segments.speaker: Nicodemus

segments.text: Jesus answered and said unto him,
Verily, verily, I say unto thee, Except a man be born again, he cannot see the kingdom of God.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: How can a man be born when he is old? can he enter the second time into his mother's womb, and be born?
segments.speaker: Nicodemus

segments.text: Jesus answered,
Verily, verily, I say unto thee, Except a man be born of water and of the Spirit, he cannot enter into the kingdom of God.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: How can these things be?
segments.speaker: Nicodemus

segments.text: Jesus answered and said unto him,
Art thou a master of Israel, and knowest not these things?
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: After these things came Jesus and his disciples into the land of Judæa; and there he tarried with them, and baptized.
And John also was baptizing in Ænon near to Salim, because there was much water there: and they came, and were baptized.
For John was not yet cast into prison.
Then there arose a question between some of John's disciples and the Jews about purifying.
And they came unto John, and said unto him,
Rabbi, he that was with thee beyond Jordan, to whom thou barest witness, behold, the same baptizeth, and all men come to him.
segments.speaker: John's Disciples

segments.text: A man can receive nothing, except it be given him from heaven.
segments.speaker: John

segments.text: Ye yourselves bear me witness, that I said, I am not the Christ, but that I am sent before him.
segments.speaker: John

segments.text: He that hath the bride is the bridegroom: but the friend of the bridegroom, which standeth and heareth him, rejoiceth greatly because of the bridegroom's voice: this my joy therefore is fulfilled.
segments.speaker: John

segments.text: He must increase, but I must decrease.
segments.speaker: John
